inputs.titre: Début de la construction du Palais des Doges à Venise

reason: The image depicts the construction of a large stone building, presumably the Doge's Palace, with workers dressed in period-appropriate clothing. The architecture seems consistent with the era, and there are no immediately obvious modern anachronisms. The general atmosphere conveys the early stages of a significant construction project in a Venetian setting. However, certain minor details could be more accurate, such as the exact style of the windows or the cut of the workers' garments. The style of building construction also seems relatively modern. Still, on the whole, it does not have any instant rejection criterias.
